mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020502-01#Sql001～012 */ * FROM ( SELECT count(*) over () as TOTAL_ROW
, CALC_DATE AS DATE_YMD
, CALC_DATE AS DATE_YM
, BROKER_CODE , MAX(BROKER_NAME) AS BROKER_NAME
, BROKER_CHARGE_CODE AS EMP_CODE , MAX(BROKER_CHARGE_NAME) AS BROKER_CHARGE_NAME
, MAX(BROKER_BRANCH_CODE) AS BRANCH_CODE , MAX(BROKER_BRANCH_NAME) AS BRANCH_NAME
, DEALER_NUMBER , CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE , MAX(CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE_NAME) AS COURSE
, SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_1, 0)) AS OTHER1 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_2, 0)) AS OTHER2 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_3, 0)) AS OTHER3 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_4, 0)) AS OTHER4 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_5, 0)) AS OTHER5 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_6, 0)) AS OTHER6
, SUM(NVL(EXCISE_TAX, 0)) AS CONSUMPTION_TAX , SUM(NVL(TOTAL, 0)) AS PAYMENT_FEE_AMOUNT
, SUM(NVL(INTERNAL_KABU, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_STOCK_SPOT , SUM(NVL(FEE_2, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_STOCK_MARGIN , SUM(NVL(FEE_3, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_STOCK_IPO_PO , SUM(NVL(INTERNAL_CB, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_CB , SUM(NVL(INTERNAL_TOUSHIN, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_MUTUAL_FUND_SALES , SUM(NVL(INTERNAL_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_MUTUAL_FUND_TRUST_FEE , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_TOUSHIN, 0)) AS FOREIGN_MUTUAL_FUND_SALES , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU, 0)) AS FOREIGN_MUTUAL_FUND_TRUST_FEE , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU_SHIBO, 0)) AS FOREIGN_MUTUAL_FUND_OTHER_TRUST_FEE , SUM(NVL(SAKIMONOOP, 0)) AS FUTURES_OPTIONS , SUM(NVL(INTERNAL_SAIKEN, 0)) AS DOMESTIC_BOND , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENKA, 0)) AS JPY_FOREIGN_BOND , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENCHI, 0)) AS FOREIGN_BOND , SUM(NVL(FOREIGN_KABU_ENKETU, 0)) AS FOREIGN_STOCK , SUM(NVL(GAI_MMF_SHINTAKU, 0)) AS FOREIGN_MMF_TRUST_FEE , SUM(NVL(KAWASE_TORI, 0)) AS FX_TRADE , SUM(NVL(AMERICAN_STOCK_CREDIT,0))AS AMERICA_STOCK_MARGIN , SUM(NVL(ST, 0)) AS ST , SUM(NVL(ST_SINTAKU, 0)) AS ST_SINTAKU , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_01, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_01 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_02, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_02 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_03, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_03 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_04, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_04 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_05, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_05 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_06, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_06 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_07, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_07 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_08, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_08 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_09, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_09 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_10, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_10 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_11, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_11 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_12, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_12 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_13, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_13 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_14, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_14 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_15, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_15 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_16, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_16 , SUM(NVL(SBI_RAP_17, 0)) AS SBI_RAP_17
, SUM(NVL(FEE, 0)) AS COMM_TOTAL
, SUM(NVL(REWARD_37, 0)) AS REWARD_37 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_38, 0)) AS REWARD_38 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_39, 0)) AS REWARD_39 , SUM(NVL(REWARD_40, 0)) AS REWARD_40 , SUM(NVL(RAP_MILEAGE, 0)) AS MUTUAL_FUND_SBI_WRAP_MILEAGE , SUM(NVL(MILEAGE, 0)) AS MUTUAL_FUND_MILEAGE , SUM(NVL(STOCK_POINT, 0)) AS SPOT_STOCK_POINT , SUM(NVL(REWARD_SUBTOTAL, 0)) AS REWARD_SUBTOTAL , SUM(NVL(REWARD_TOTAL, 0)) AS TOTAL
FROM ( SELECT COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE , COMM_FEE.BROKER_NAME
, COMM_FEE.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE , COMM_FEE.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME
, COMM_FEE.DEALER_NUMBER , COMM_FEE.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE , COMM_FEE.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE_NAME
, NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_1, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_1 , NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_2, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_2 , NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_3, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_3 , NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_4, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_4 , NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_5, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_5 , NVL(REWARD_EXTRA_6, 0) AS REWARD_EXTRA_6
, NVL(EXCISE_TAX, 0) AS EXCISE_TAX , NVL(PAY, 0) AS TOTAL
,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CALC_DATE
,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY/MM') AS CALC_DATE
, NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_1, 0) AS INTERNAL_KABU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_2, 0) AS FEE_2 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_3, 0) AS FEE_3 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_4, 0) AS INTERNAL_CB , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_5, 0) AS INTERNAL_TOUSHIN , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_6, 0) AS INTERNAL_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_7, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_8, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_9, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU_SHIBO , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_10, 0) AS SAKIMONOOP , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_11, 0) AS INTERNAL_SAIKEN , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_12, 0) AS FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENKA , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_13, 0) AS FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENCHI , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_14, 0) AS FOREIGN_KABU_ENKETU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_15, 0) AS GAI_MMF_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_16, 0) AS KAWASE_TORI , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_17, 0) AS AMERICAN_STOCK_CREDIT , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_18, 0) AS ST , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_19, 0) AS SBI_RAP_01 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_20, 0) AS SBI_RAP_02 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_21, 0) AS SBI_RAP_03 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_22, 0) AS SBI_RAP_04 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_23, 0) AS SBI_RAP_05 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_24, 0) AS SBI_RAP_06 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_25, 0) AS SBI_RAP_07 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_26, 0) AS SBI_RAP_08 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_27, 0) AS SBI_RAP_09 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_28, 0) AS SBI_RAP_10 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_29, 0) AS SBI_RAP_11 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_30, 0) AS SBI_RAP_12 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_31, 0) AS SBI_RAP_13 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_32, 0) AS SBI_RAP_14 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_33, 0) AS SBI_RAP_15 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_34, 0) AS SBI_RAP_16 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_35, 0) AS SBI_RAP_17 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_36, 0) AS ST_SINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_37, 0) AS REWARD_37 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_38, 0) AS REWARD_38 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_39, 0) AS REWARD_39 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_40, 0) AS REWARD_40 , NVL(COMM_FEE.FEE_TOTAL, 0) AS FEE
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY/MM') AS CALC_DATE , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_1, 0) AS INTERNAL_KABU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_2, 0) AS FEE_2 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_3, 0) AS FEE_3 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_4, 0) AS INTERNAL_CB , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_5, 0) AS INTERNAL_TOUSHIN , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_6, 0) AS INTERNAL_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_7, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_8, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_9, 0) AS FOREIGN_TOUSHIN_SHINTAKU_SHIBO , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_10, 0) AS SAKIMONOOP , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_11, 0) AS INTERNAL_SAIKEN , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_12, 0) AS FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENKA , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_13, 0) AS FOREIGN_SAIKEN_ENCHI , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_14, 0) AS FOREIGN_KABU_ENKETU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_15, 0) AS GAI_MMF_SHINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_16, 0) AS KAWASE_TORI , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_17, 0) AS AMERICAN_STOCK_CREDIT , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_18, 0) AS ST , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_19, 0) AS SBI_RAP_01 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_20, 0) AS SBI_RAP_02 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_21, 0) AS SBI_RAP_03 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_22, 0) AS SBI_RAP_04 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_23, 0) AS SBI_RAP_05 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_24, 0) AS SBI_RAP_06 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_25, 0) AS SBI_RAP_07 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_26, 0) AS SBI_RAP_08 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_27, 0) AS SBI_RAP_09 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_28, 0) AS SBI_RAP_10 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_29, 0) AS SBI_RAP_11 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_30, 0) AS SBI_RAP_12 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_31, 0) AS SBI_RAP_13 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_32, 0) AS SBI_RAP_14 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_33, 0) AS SBI_RAP_15 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_34, 0) AS SBI_RAP_16 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_35, 0) AS SBI_RAP_17 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_36, 0) AS ST_SINTAKU , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_37, 0) AS REWARD_37 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_38, 0) AS REWARD_38 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_39, 0) AS REWARD_39 , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_40, 0) AS REWARD_40 , NVL(COMM_FEE.RAP_MILEAGE,0) AS RAP_MILEAGE , NVL(COMM_FEE.MILEAGE,0) AS MILEAGE , NVL(COMM_FEE.STOCK_POINT,0) AS STOCK_POINT
, 0 AS REWARD_SUBTOTAL , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_SUBTOTAL,0) AS REWARD_TOTAL
, NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_SUBTOTAL,0) AS REWARD_SUBTOTAL , NVL(COMM_FEE.REWARD_TOTAL,0) AS REWARD_TOTAL
, COMM_FEE.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE , COMM_FEE.BROKER_BRANCH_NAME
FROM V_FEE_DAY COMM_FEE
FROM ( SELECT FEE.*, MB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME FROM V_FEE_DAY FEE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB ON FEE.BROKER_CODE = MB.BROKER_CODE AND FEE.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = MB.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE ) COMM_FEE
FROM V_FEE_MONTH COMM_FEE
FROM ( SELECT FEE.*, MB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME FROM V_FEE_MONTH FEE LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB ON FEE.BROKER_CODE = MB.BROKER_CODE AND FEE.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = MB.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE ) COMM_FEE
FROM V_REWARD COMM_FEE
FROM ( SELECT REWARD.*, MB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME FROM V_REWARD REWARD LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB ON REWARD.BROKER_CODE = MB.BROKER_CODE AND REWARD.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = MB.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE ) COMM_FEE
WHERE 1=1
AND #{req.periodFrom} <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') <= #{req.periodTo}
AND #{req.periodFrom} <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY/MM') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COMM_FEE.SUM_DATE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY/MM') <= #{req.periodTo}
AND COMM_FEE.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = #{req.branchCode}
AND COMM_FEE.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE = #{req.empCode}
AND COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE IN
#{brokerCode}
AND COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE NOT IN
#{brokerCode}
AND (COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE IN
) OR COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE IN (
,
#{brokerCharge.brokerCode}
)
AND ((COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE, COMM_FEE.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE) IN
) OR (COMM_FEE.BROKER_CODE, COMM_FEE.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE) IN (
,
(#{brokerCharge.brokerCode}, #{brokerCharge.empCode})
)
)
GROUP BY
CALC_DATE , BROKER_CODE
CALC_DATE , BROKER_CODE , DEALER_NUMBER , CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE
CALC_DATE , BROKER_CODE , BROKER_CHARGE_CODE
CALC_DATE , BROKER_CODE , BROKER_BRANCH_CODE
ORDER BY
CALC_DATE DESC ,BROKER_CODE ,BROKER_BRANCH_CODE
CALC_DATE DESC ,BROKER_CODE
)
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{req.maxRowNum}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020502-01#Sql015 */ SERVICE_NAME, SERVICE_NO, DISPLAY_CONTROL_FLAG, 'sbiRap' || SERVICE_NO AS ITEM_NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MC1.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, MC1.CODE_1 AS SERVICE_NO, NVL2(MC2.CODE_2, 0, 1) AS DISPLAY_CONTROL_FLAG FROM M_CODE MC1
LEFT OUTER JOIN M_CODE MC2 ON MC1.CODE_1 = MC2.CODE_2 AND MC2.CODE_TYPE = '48'
AND MC2.CODE_1 = #{req.brokerCode}
AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN MC2.START_DATE AND MC2.END_DATE
WHERE MC1.CODE_TYPE = '49' AND MC1.CODE_2 = '03' AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN MC1.START_DATE AND MC1.END_DATE ) ORDER BY SERVICE_NO
